name: WATSCO INC
summary: Watsco Inc. (WSO) is a distributor of air conditioning, heating, and refrigeration (HVAC/R) equipment and related parts and supplies. The company operates through a network of distribution locations across the United States and international markets, serving contractors and dealers in the residential and commercial construction sectors. Its business is seasonal in nature and subject to weather patterns, housing starts, and commodity cost fluctuations.

products.name: Air Conditioning Equipment
products.description: Distribution of air conditioning equipment for residential and commercial applications.

products.name: Heating Equipment
products.description: Distribution of heating equipment for residential and commercial markets.

products.name: Refrigeration Equipment
products.description: Distribution of refrigeration (HVAC/R) equipment and related products.

products.name: HVAC/R Parts and Supplies
products.description: Distribution of parts and supplies related to HVAC/R systems.
